overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a character in traditional Japanese attire exploring a foggy coastal environment. The character walks along rocky shores, through shallow streams, and past a fishing village with wooden docks and campfires.

events.description: character passes through dense bushes temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline toward the metal tower

entered.detail: tall metal lattice tower standing on the rocky shore
uneven rocky ground with scattered stones and driftwood
calm turquoise water visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy rocky coastline with a large metal watchtower visible ahead on the right. The ocean stretches out to the left with distant rock formations visible through the mist.

events.description: character steps from sandy beach into shallow water

agents.ego_description: walking past a campfire and entering the shallow coastal water

entered.detail: burning fire pit with stones arranged around it
scattered planks and logs washed up on the beach
faded orange flag on a wooden pole
clear shallow water covering the rocky shore

segments.scene_description: The character moves from rocky terrain onto a sandy beach scattered with wooden debris and a burning campfire. After passing the fire and tattered banner, the character steps into the shallow turquoise water.

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow stream between rocky banks

entered.detail: shallow flowing water with visible rocks beneath surface
steep rocky shoreline covered with vegetation
wooden Japanese structures visible through the fog
large gnarled tree with bare branches leaning over the water

segments.scene_description: The character continues wading through the shallow stream, with rocky banks and dense vegetation on either side. Traditional wooden buildings and a large twisted tree become visible in the misty distance ahead.

events.description: discovery UI appears indicating a new location or point of interest found

agents.ego_description: walking along the shore observing the fisherman and approaching the settlement

notable_agents.action: standing in shallow water fishing with a spear near the dock

entered.detail: long wooden pier extending into the water with posts
burning fire pit on the sand near the dock entrance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the water onto a sandy beach near a wooden fishing dock. An NPC fisherman stands in the water to the left, and a campfire burns on the beach as the character approaches the settlement structures, triggering a discovery notification.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a misty coastline that gradually transitions from a desolate rocky shore into a lived-in fishing settlement. It begins with the character walking past a towering metal watchtower and distant rock formations shrouded in thick fog. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows the character across a sandy beach littered with wooden debris and a burning campfire before stepping into the shallow turquoise waters of a stream. The scene then opens up as the character wades through the water between rocky banks and dense vegetation, with traditional wooden buildings and a large twisted tree emerging from the mist ahead. Finally, the camera emerges from the stream onto a sandy beach near a wooden dock, passing a fisherman in the water and another campfire as the character enters the settlement.
